The government needs to take immediate action to solve the problem. 政府需要立即採取行動來解決問題。
She gave an immediate reply to my important text message. 她立刻回覆了我那則重要的簡訊。
We reviewed the message immediately to avoid mistakes. 我們很immediately地檢查訊息，以避免出錯。
Our teacher replied immediately and solved the issue. 我們老師immediately地回應，並解決了問題。
The project will require an immense amount of time and resources to complete. 該專案將需要巨大的時間和資源才能完成。
They felt an immense sense of relief when they heard that everyone was safe. 聽到大家都平安無事，他們感到極大的欣慰（巨大）。

meaning: 大大;極大；極度;極大；在很大程度上。
sentences: I enjoyed the party immensely. 我非常喜歡這個聚會。
This question is immensely difficult. 這個問題非常困難。

meaning: 放置在流體中（通常是液體，但也可以是氣體）。
sentences: Archimedes determined the volume of objects by immersing them in water. 阿基米德透過將物體浸入水中來確定其體積。
People often immerse when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會沉浸其中。

meaning: 將一個人完全浸入水中作為洗禮的行為。
sentences: The term immersion refers to the total submerging of a person in water as an act of baptism. 浸沒一詞是指將人完全浸入水中作為洗禮的行為。
The lesson introduced immersion as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了沉浸式這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 沉浸式的、讓人身歷其境的。常用來形容體驗（體驗感很強）、環境（包覆感/臨場感）、科技（VR/AR）、展覽、課程等，讓你「很投入、像在其中」。
sentences: The museum offers an immersive virtual reality tour of ancient Rome. 這間博物館提供了古羅馬的沉浸式虛擬實境導覽。
The sound system provides an immersive audio experience for movie lovers. 這套音響系統為電影愛好者提供了身歷其境的音效體驗。
The city is a fascinating blend of various immigrant groups. 這座城市是各個移民群體的迷人融合。
The company is planning to hire additional staff from immigrants. 公司正計劃從移民中雇用額外的人員。
They decided to immigrate to Canada for a better life and work. 他們為了更好的生活與工作決定移民到加拿大。
Millions of people managed to immigrate to the country lately. 最近有數百萬人竟然（能）移民到了這個國家。
The government is taking steps to control illegal immigration now. 政府現在正採取措施管制非法移民。
The city center is always crowded with new immigration services. 市中心總是擠滿了新的移民服務（機構）。
The dark clouds suggested that a heavy storm was imminent. 烏雲預示著一場強風暴即將來臨。
The government warned citizens of an imminent threat to national security. 政府向公民發出了關於國家安全迫在眉睫的威脅的警告。

meaning: 四 不道德的,邪惡的
sentences: That is a immoral way to handle the list. 那是處理清單時很immoral的方法。
We need a more immoral plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更immoral的計畫。
Without immorality, the team could not finish on time. 沒有immorality，團隊就無法準時完成。
We need more immorality to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多immorality才能有效解決這個問題。

meaning: 區 不道德地,邪惡地
sentences: Our teacher spoke immorally during the discussion. 我們老師在討論時說話很immorally。
Please read the instructions immorally before you start. 開始前請先immorally地閱讀說明。

meaning: 永遠不會被遺忘；值得永遠記得的。
sentences: his immortal words 他不朽的話語
Something described as immortal is never to be forgotten; that merits being always remembered. 所謂不朽的東西是永遠不會被忘記的；這值得永遠記得。
In Greek mythology, Tithonus was granted immortality but not eternal youth. 在希臘神話中，提托諾斯被賦予了永生，但並沒有獲得永恆的青春。
The term immortality refers to the condition of being immortal. Never dying. 不朽這個字是指不朽的狀態。永遠不會死。

meaning: 無法進行身體移動；固定的
sentences: The report describes the result as immovable. 報告稱這一結果是不可改變的。
Everyone noticed the immovable tone of the message. 大家都注意到了這則訊息的語氣不動聲色。
Vaccinations help your body build a strong immune system against diseases. 接種疫苗有助於你的身體建立強大的免疫系統來對抗疾病。
High-level officials are not immune from criticism for their business decisions. 高層官員並不能免於對其業務決策的批評。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "immune system" for next week. 老師要我們把「immune system」背起來，下週要用。
I heard "immune system" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「immune system」，就把它記進筆記本。
Without immunity, the team could not finish on time. 沒有immunity，團隊就無法準時完成。
The engineer's immunity made the plan easier to follow. 工程師的immunity讓計畫更容易執行。

meaning: 一個人以受控方式安全地接觸某種材料的過程，該材料旨在增強其免疫系統抵抗該材料的能力。
sentences: Immunization against influenza is important for all child-care workers. Immunization against influenza is important for all child-care workers.

The term immunization refers to the process by which a person is safely exposed in a controlled manner to a material that is designed to prime their immune system against that material. 術語「免疫」是指一個人以受控方式安全地接觸某種材料的過程，該材料旨在激發他們的免疫系統針對該材料的抵抗力。
Our team immunizes this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會immunize這個步驟。
If you immunize every day, your skills improve quickly. 如果你每天都immunize，能力會進步得很快。
We discussed the term immunology in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 immunology 這個詞。
Mia wrote down immunology with the note "免疫學". Mia把 immunology 記下來，並註記「免疫學」。
The government has enacted an immutable law. 政府制定了不可改變的法律。
The report describes the result as immutable. 該報告將結果描述為不可變的。
Environmental pollution has a devastating impact on our world. 環境污染對我們的世界產生了毀滅性的影響。
The new policy managing to have a significant impact on economy. 新政策竟然對經濟產生了顯著影響。
Being the last teeth to erupt in the oral cavity, many wisdom teeth are impacted. 作為口腔中最後萌出的牙齒，許多智齒都會受到阻生。
The report describes the result as impacted. 該報告將結果描述為「受到影響」。
visual impairment 視力障礙
The term impairment refers to a disability or handicap. 術語“損傷”是指殘疾或障礙。

meaning: 一種非洲羚羊，Aepyceros melampus，以其跳躍能力而聞名；雄性有脊狀、彎曲的角。
sentences: The term impala refers to an African antelope, Aepyceros melampus, noted for its leaping ability; the male has ridged, curved horns. 黑斑羚一詞指的是非洲羚羊 Aepyceros melampus，因其跳躍能力而聞名。雄性有脊狀、彎曲的角。
The lesson introduced impala as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了黑斑羚作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 給予或給予（例如品質或財產）。
sentences: The sun imparts warmth. 太陽 帶來 溫暖。 陽光給人溫暖。 太陽帶來溫暖。
to impart food to the poor 提供窮人 食物 分發食物給窮人 為窮人提供食物

meaning: 平等對待所有當事人、競爭對手或爭議者；不偏袒；沒有偏見。
sentences: Something described as impartial is treating all parties, rivals, or disputants equally; not partial; not biased. 所謂公正，是指平等對待所有當事人、競爭對手或爭議者。不偏袒；沒有偏見。
The word impartial is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 公正一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
We asked the impatient for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位impatient請教。
Our team invited a skilled impatient to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的impatient帶領工作坊。
Stella was waiting impatiently for the delivery to come. 史黛拉焦急地等待著送貨的到來。
The team responded impatiently to the change. 團隊對這項變化反應不耐煩。

meaning: 對公職人員提起法律訴訟。
sentences: President Clinton was impeached by the House in November 1998, but since the Senate acquitted him, he was not removed from office. 1998年11月，柯林頓總統被眾議院彈劾，但參議院宣判他無罪後，他並沒有被解職。
People often impeach when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在形勢需要時進行彈劾。

meaning: 質疑或挑戰某事物的準確性或適當性的行為。
sentences: The term impeachment refers to the act of calling into question or challenging the accuracy or propriety of something. 彈劾一詞是指質疑或質疑某事物的準確性或適當性的行為。
The lesson introduced impeachment as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了彈劾這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 沒有能力做錯事或犯罪；完美無瑕。
sentences: It was easy for James V to imprison Lady Glamis, but actually convicting her was far more difficult; her character was impeccable and she was highly respected by all who knew her. 詹姆斯五世監禁格拉米斯夫人很容易，但真正給她定罪卻困難得多。她的品格無可挑剔，所有認識她的人都高度尊重她。
Something described as impeccable is incapable of wrongdoing or sin; immaculate. 被描述為完美無瑕的事物是不可能做錯事或犯罪的；完美無瑕。

meaning: 妨礙行為；阻礙的事物；一個障礙。
sentences: The term impedance refers to the act of impeding; that which impedes; a hindrance. 阻抗一詞是指阻礙的行為；阻礙的事物；一個障礙。
The lesson introduced impedance as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了阻抗這個易於理解的有用術語。
impede someone's progress 阻礙某人的進步
To impede means to get in the way of; to hinder. 妨礙意味著妨礙；阻礙。
Our team invited a skilled impediment to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的impediment帶領工作坊。
The impediment explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位impediment清楚地向大家說明了問題。

meaning: 接近;臨近；即將發生或預期發生。
sentences: I have no time right now because of an impending paper submission deadline. 由於論文提交截止日期即將到來，我現在沒有時間。
The report describes the result as impending. 報告稱結果即將公佈。

meaning: 難以理解；深不可測；深不可測。
sentences: Business jargon makes this document impenetrable —I can’t understand it. 商業術語讓這份文件難以理解——我無法理解。
The report describes the result as impenetrable. 報告稱這項結果令人難以理解。
It is imperative that we take immediate action to address the problem. 我們必須立即採取行動來解決這個問題。
The manager spoke in an imperative tone, giving us clear instructions. 經理以命令式的（必要的）口吻說話，給了我們清晰的指示。

meaning: 單性：具有雄花（有雄蕊）或雌花（有雌蕊），但不能同時具有兩種花。
sentences: Something described as imperfect is unisexual: having either male (with stamens) or female (with pistil) flowers, but not with both. 被描述為不完美的事物是單性的：具有雄性（具有雄蕊）或雌性（具有雌蕊）花，但不能同時具有兩者。
The word imperfect is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不完美」這個詞經常用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 那些不完美的品質或特徵；不完美的特徵、狀態或品質。
sentences: You can accept your imperfection or try to improve. 你可以接受自己的不完美，也可以嘗試改進。
The term imperfection refers to Those qualities or features that are imperfect; the characteristic, state, or quality of being imperfect. 術語「不完美」是指那些不完美的品質或特徵；不完美的特徵、狀態或品質。
The imperial palace was one of the most magnificent buildings in the city. 皇宮是該市最宏偉的建築之一。
The country experienced major social changes following the end of imperial rule. 該國在帝國統治結束後經歷了重大的社會變革。

meaning: 屬於帝國主義或與帝國主義有關。
sentences: Something described as imperialist is of, or relating to imperialism. 被描述為帝國主義的事物屬於帝國主義或與帝國主義有關。
The word imperialist is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 帝國主義這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。

meaning: 不受某事影響或不能受某事影響。
sentences: The man was completely impervious to the deception we were trying. 這個人對我們試圖欺騙的行為完全無動於衷。
The report describes the result as impervious. 報告稱結果是不滲透的。
The young man's impetuosity often got him into trouble. 那個年輕人的魯莽經常讓他陷入麻煩。
The CEO regretted his impetuosity in making the decision. 執行長後悔自己做決定時太過衝動。
He is an impetuous person who acts without thinking. 他是個不假思索就行動的衝動的人。
Don't make any impetuous decisions that you might regret later. 不要做出任何你以後可能會後悔的魯莽決定。

meaning: 任何有推動力的事物；一個刺激因素。
sentences: The outbreak of World War II in 1939 gave a new impetus to receiver development. 1939年第二次世界大戰的爆發為接收機的發展帶來了新的動力。
The term impetus refers to Anything that impels; a stimulating factor. 推動力一詞是指任何推動的事物；一個刺激因素。

meaning: 牢固地固定或牢固地或深深固定。
sentences: To implant means to fix firmly or set securely or deeply. 植入意味著牢固地固定或牢固地或深深固定。
People may implant in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下植入。

meaning: 種植；將植物等固定在地下。
sentences: The term implantation refers to planting; securing a plant etc. into the ground. 術語“植入”是指種植；將植物等固定到地下。
The lesson introduced implantation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了植入作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The government plans to implement the new environmental policy early next year. 政府計畫在明年初實施新的環保政策。
We need more funding and resources to implement the project effectively. 我們需要更多資金 and 資源來有效執行該專案。

meaning: 實施某事的結果；成品、系統或設備。
sentences: His implementation works, but it needs some fine-tuning. 他的實現有效，但需要一些微調。
The term implementation refers to A result of implementing something; a finished product, system or device. 術語「實施」是指實施某事的結果；成品、系統或設備。

meaning: 表現出與不利或犯罪的方式有連結或參與。
sentences: The evidence implicates involvement of top management in the scheme. 證據顯示高層管理人員參與了該計劃。
People often implicate when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會牽涉其中。
The news story had several serious implications for the local community. 這篇新聞報導對當地社區產生了幾項嚴重的影響。
She didn't say it directly, but the implication was clear that she was leaving. 她沒有直接說，但她的暗示很明顯，她要離開了。
There was an implicit understanding between them that they would help each other. 他們之間有一種隱含的默契，即他們會互相幫助。
I have implicit trust in her ability to manage the complex project. 我對她管理這個複雜專案的能力有著絕對的信任。
tell someone implicitly 含蓄地告訴某人
He was punished for asking for answers implicitly during the exam. 他因在考試期間含蓄地詢問答案而受到懲罰。
She implored him to stay, but he decided to leave. 她哀求他留下，但他決定離開。
I implore you to reconsider your decision. 我懇求你重新考慮你的決定。

meaning: 空氣的 湧入 ，形成 吸力停止 。
sentences: The term implosion refers to The inrush of air in forming a suction stop. 內爆一詞是指空氣 湧入 形成 吸力停止 。 術語「內爆」是指形成吸力停止時的空氣湧入。 內爆是指空氣湧入形成吸力停止。
The lesson introduced implosion as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了內爆這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了內爆這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
His rude behavior managed to imply that he didn't respect us. 他粗魯的行為竟然意味著（暗示）他不尊重我們。
The results of the study managing to imply a clear connection now. 研究結果現在竟然（能）暗示了一種明確的聯繫。
It was very impolite of him to leave without saying goodbye. 他不告而別是非常沒禮貌的。
Try not to be impolite to your guests. 儘量不要對客人沒禮貌。
Taiwan is a major importer of high-quality organic grain crops. 台灣是高品質有機穀類作物的主要進口國。
The company is planning to import its products from larger markets. 公司正計劃從更大的市場進口產品。
The teacher emphasized the importance of regular practice. 老師強調了定期練習的重要性。
Education is of great importance for a successful future. 教育對於成功的未來至關重要。
It is important to get enough sleep for your health. 為了健康，獲得足夠的睡眠很重要。
Please keep these important documents in a safe place. 請將這些重要的文件放在安全的地方。

meaning: 用於將語句標記為具有重要性。
sentences: If someone acts importantly, they do so in a way that is used to mark a statement as having importance. 如果某人的行為很重要，那麼他們這樣做的方式就是將某句話標記為具有重要性。
The speaker responded importantly during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了重要回應。

meaning: 進口的；從國外引進一國的商品或貨物。
sentences: The term importation refers to that which is imported; commodities or wares introduced into a country from abroad. 進口一詞是指進口的；從國外引進一國的商品或貨物。
The lesson introduced importation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了導入作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 進口者或進口者：尤指將貨物進口到某個國家的個人或公司。
sentences: India is the world's biggest importer of gold. 印度是世界上最大的黃金進口國。
The data importer has crashed. Did we receive a corrupted file? 資料導入器已崩潰。我們收到了損壞的文件嗎？
The government decided to impose a new tax on luxury goods now. 政府決定現在對奢侈品徵收（強加）一項新稅。
Don't try to impose your personal values and beliefs on others. 不要試圖將妳個人的價值觀與信念強加於他人。
The new library is an imposing building made of glass and steel. 新圖書館是一座由玻璃和鋼鐵構成的壯觀建築。
He has an imposing presence that commands respect from everyone. 他有一種令人印象深刻的風度（氣場），贏得了每個人的尊重。

meaning: 在宗教儀式中按手在人身上的做法；使用例如在確認和任命中。
sentences: The term imposition refers to a practice of laying hands on a person in a religious ceremony; used e.g. in confirmation and ordination. 強加一詞是指在宗教儀式中按手在人身上的做法；使用例如在確認和任命中。
The lesson introduced imposition as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了強加作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Meeting the deadline is an impossibility; there is no way we can be ready in time. 在最後期限前完成任務是不可能的；我們不可能及時做好準備。
The term impossibility refers to Something that is impossible. 「不可能」一詞指的是不可能的事。
It's impossible to finish the work in such a short time. 在這麼短的時間內完成工作是不可能的。
He thought the task was impossible, but he managed to do it. 他以為這項任務是不可能的，但他還是設法完成了。
The topology problem was impossibly difficult. 拓樸問題極為困難。
The team responded impossibly to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了不可思議的反應。
The charity provides food and aid to impoverished families. 該慈善機構為貧困家庭提供食物和援助。
The soil has become impoverished due to over-farming. 由於過度耕種，土壤已經變得貧瘠。
Something described as impractical is not practical; impracticable. 被描述為不切實際的東西是不切實際的；不切實際的。
The word impractical is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不切實際這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
He worked hard to impress his boss with his dedication and skills. 他努力工作，以他的奉獻精神與技能讓老闆留下深刻印象。
She managed to impress everyone with her brilliant presentation. 她成功以精彩的簡報給每個人留下了深刻印象。
It's important to make a good first impression at an interview. 在工作面試中留下良好的第一印象是很重要的。
She has a very favorable impression of her new job and manager. 她對新工作與經理有著非常好的印象。
She gave a very impressive presentation at the conference. 她在會議上做了一場令人印象深刻的簡報。
The new library building is a truly impressive structure. 這座新的圖書館大樓簡直是一座令人讚嘆的建築。

meaning: 一個印象；印某物留下的痕跡。
sentences: The day left an imprint in my mind. 那一天在我的腦海裡留下了深刻的印象。
The term imprint refers to an impression; the mark left behind by printing something. 印記一詞是指印記；印某物時留下的痕跡。
The suspect was imprisoned following his conviction for the robbery. 嫌疑人在搶劫罪名成立後被監禁。
The court sentenced the criminal to ten years of imprisonment. 法院判處該罪犯十年監禁。

meaning: 監禁在某個地方，尤指監獄或看守所，尤指作為對犯罪的懲罰。
sentences: The term imprisonment refers to a confinement in a place, especially a prison or a jail, especially as punishment for a crime. 監禁一詞指的是在一個地方，特別是監獄或看守所的監禁，特別是作為對犯罪的懲罰。
The lesson introduced imprisonment as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了監禁這個易於理解的有用術語。
It's highly improbable that aliens abducted you. 外星人綁架你的可能性極低。
Something described as improbable is not likely to be true. 被描述為不可能的事情不太可能是真的。

meaning: 即興創作；未經事先準備、規劃或排練。
sentences: The party began with an impromptu rendition of 'Happy Birthday'. 晚會在即興表演的《生日快樂》中開始。
an impromptu speech 即興演講

meaning: 不符合傳統習俗或良好舉止；不雅或不謙虛的。
sentences: improper conduct 不當行為
Something described as improper is not in keeping with conventional mores or good manners; indecent or immodest. 被描述為不當的行為不符合傳統習俗或良好舉止；不雅或不謙虛的。

meaning: 以不正當的方式；不正確。
sentences: If someone acts improperly, they do so in a way that is in an improper manner; not properly. 如果某人的行為不正當，那麼他們的行為方式就是不正當的；不正確。
The speaker responded improperly during the discussion. 發言者在討論過程中回應不當。
I hope to improve my English skills this semester. 我希望這學期能提高我的英語技能。
The company is working hard to improve its products. 公司正努力改善其產品。
I'm taking an online course to improve my speaking skills. 我正修一門線上課程以提升我的口說能力。
There has been a significant improvement in his health lately. 他的健康最近有了顯著的改善。
There has been a significant improvement in her health. 她的健康狀況有了顯著改善。
The new model is a major improvement over the old one. 新款比舊款有很大的進步。

meaning: 即興創作和創作音樂、詩歌等的行為或藝術
sentences: He played a quick improvisation on the keyboard. 他在鍵盤上快速 即興演奏 。 他在鍵盤上快速即興演奏。 他在鍵盤上即時興播放。

The term improvisation refers to The act or art of composing and making music, poetry, and the like, extemporaneously. 即興創作一詞是指即興創作和創作音樂、詩歌等的行為或藝術， 即興創作 。 即興創作一詞是指即興創作和創作音樂、詩歌等的行為或藝術。 即興創作是指即興創作和創作音樂、詩歌等行為或藝術，即興創作。

meaning: 隨心所欲地編造或發明某物；僅以想像力、直覺和猜測為指導，而不是透過仔細的計劃來進行。
sentences: He had no speech prepared, so he improvised. 他沒有準備好演講，所以他即興演講。
They improvised a simple shelter with branches and the rope they were carrying. 他們用樹枝和攜帶的繩子臨時搭建了一個簡單的避難所。
He had a sudden impulse to quit his job and travel around the world. 他突然有一種辭職去環遊世界的衝動。
I bought this dress on impulse, and now I'm not sure if I really like it. 我衝動之下買了這件洋裝，現在我不確定自己是否真的喜歡它。
She is an impulsive buyer who often spends more than she can afford. 她是個衝動的購物者，經常入不敷出。
His impulsive decision led to many problems. 他衝動的決定導致了許多問題。

meaning: 免受懲罰或報復；免受任何報復或行動、行為等造成的傷害性後果的保障。
sentences: The term impunity refers to freedom from punishment or retribution; security from any reprisal or injurious consequences of an action, behaviour etc. 有罪不罰一詞是指免受懲罰或報復；免受任何行動、行為等報復或傷害性後果的保障。
The lesson introduced impunity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了有罪不罰這個術語，這是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 不貞潔的；淫穢的（不符合或不遵守某些性道德體系）
sentences: He was thinking impure thoughts involving a girl from school. 他正在思考與學校裡的一個女孩有關的不純潔的想法。
The report describes the result as impure. 報告稱結果不純。
My keys are in my bag; I'll get them for you. 我的鑰匙在包包裡，我這就拿給妳。
He lives in a small apartment in the city center. 他住在市中心的一間小公寓裡。

meaning: 看到自己寫的短篇小說發表在當地的
sentences: "in newspaper" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「in newspaper」非常好用。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "in newspaper" for next week. 老師要我們把「in newspaper」背起來，下週要用。
His inability to speak English made it hard for him to find a job. 他不會說英語使他很難找到工作。
The company's inability to adapt to changes led to its failure. 公司無法適應變化導致了其失敗。

meaning: 無法訪問；遙不可及；不方便。
sentences: physically inaccessible 物理上无法接近
remote and inaccessible 远程且无法访问
Something described as inaccurate is mistaken or incorrect; not accurate. 被描述為不準確的事物是錯誤的或不正確的；不準確。
The word inaccurate is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不準確這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或情況。
The term inaction refers to Lack of action or activity or labor. 「不作為」一詞是指缺乏行動、活動或勞動。
We learned the meaning of inaction during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學到了不作為的意義。
The volcano has been inactive for over a century. 這座火山已經沈寂了一個多世紀。
The account has been inactive for several months. 該帳戶已經停用幾個月了。

meaning: 不活躍的品質；懶惰;被動性。
sentences: The term inactivity refers to the quality of being inactive; idleness; passiveness. 不活動這個字是指不活動的品質。懶惰;被動性。
The lesson introduced inactivity as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「不活動」是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 不充分；缺乏所需的品質或數量；不足以達到某個目的。
sentences: inadequate resources 資源不足
inadequate representation 代表性不足

meaning: 缺乏運動的品質或能力；作為無生命的物體。
sentences: Something described as inanimate is lacking the quality or ability of motion; as an inanimate object. 被描述為無生命的東西是缺乏運動的品質或能力；作為一個無生命的物體。
The word inanimate is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 無生命這個字常用來描述一個人、事物或情況。
His behavior was highly inappropriate for a professional setting. 他的行為在專業場合非常不恰當。
The movie was deemed inappropriate for young children. 這部電影被認為不適合幼兒觀看。
The inattentive driver failed to see the red light. 那位疏忽大意的司機沒看到紅燈。
He was often inattentive during the long lectures. 他在漫長的講座中經常心不在焉。
The inaugural of the President will take place in March. 總統就職典禮將於三月舉行。
The term inaugural refers to an inauguration; a formal beginning. 就職典禮一詞是指就職典禮；正式開始。

meaning: 任何運動、企業、建築、活動等的正式開始、啟動或投入使用。
sentences: The inauguration of the new bar was a success, with plenty of discounts. 新酒吧的開幕很成功，有很多折扣。
The term inauguration refers to the formal beginning, initiation, or entry into service of any movement, enterprise, building, event, etc. 就職一詞是指任何運動、企業、建築、活動等的正式開始、啟動或投入使用。
He has an inborn talent for music. 他有天生的音樂才華。
Some birds have an inborn instinct for migration. 某些鳥類有天生的遷徙本能。

meaning: 將球傳至界內；把球丟進去。
sentences: Smith inbounds the ball to Johnson. 史密斯將球傳給約翰遜。
To inbound means to pass a ball inbounds; to throw the ball in. To inbound 指將球傳入界內；把球丟進去。
Since you all marry your cousins I bet you're a bunch of inbreds. 既然你們都嫁給了你們的表兄弟，我敢打賭你們是一群近親繁殖的人。
The term inbred refers to A person born of incest. 近親繁殖一詞是指亂倫所生的人。
The incandescent light bulb provided a warm glow. 白熾燈泡發出溫暖的光芒。
She gave an incandescent performance that amazed the audience. 她進行了一場令人驚嘆的光彩奪目的表演。
He is incapable of telling a lie. 他不會撒謊。
The machine is incapable of handling such a large amount of data. 這台機器無法處理如此大量的數據。

meaning: 被視為體現或表現出某種特質、想法等的人或事物。
sentences: The leading dancer is the incarnation of grace. 領舞是優雅的化身。
The term incarnation refers to a person or thing regarded as embodying or exhibiting some quality, idea, or the like. 術語「化身」指的是被視為體現或展示某種品質、想法等的人或事物。
Politics is an incendiary topic; it tends to cause fights to break out. 政治是一個煽動性的話題；它往往會導致打架。
Something described as incendiary is inflammatory, emotionally charged. 被描述為煽動性的東西是煽動性的、情緒激動的。
I think it would incense him to learn the truth. 我認為了解真相會激怒他。
To incense means to anger or infuriate. 焚香的意思是生氣或激怒。
The company offered a generous bonus as an incentive for employees to work harder. 公司提供了優厚的獎金，作為鼓勵（誘因）員工更加努力工作的手段。
Lower taxes can provide an incentive for businesses to invest more in research. 降低稅收可以為企業加大研究投入提供動機（誘因）。

meaning: 某事物的創造或開始；機構。
sentences: From its inception, the agency has been helping people obtain and properly install car seats for children. 自成立以來，該機構一直在幫助人們取得並正確安裝兒童汽車座椅。
The term inception refers to the creation or beginning of something; the establishment. 「開始」一詞指的是某事物的創造或開始；該機構。

meaning: 沒有 暫停 或 停止 ；不是 title>；不是<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/ending"
sentences: The dog's incessant barking kept the girl awake all night. 狗 不斷 的吠叫讓女孩整晚都睡不著。 狗狗不停的吠叫讓女孩整晚睡不著。 狗狗不斷的吠叫讓女孩整晚睡不著。
The report describes the result as incessant. 報告稱這一結果是持續不斷的。 報告稱這一結果是持續不斷的。 報告稱這一結果是持續不斷的。

meaning: 以一種沒有停頓或停止的方式，尤其是到了令人煩惱的程度；沒有停止。
sentences: He jabbered incessantly and annoyed everyone. 他喋喋不休，惹惱了所有人。
The team responded incessantly to the change. 團隊不斷對變化做出反應。

meaning: 近親之間的性關係，特別是直系親屬，有時是堂兄弟姊妹之間的性關係，通常被視為禁忌。
sentences: Genetic problems caused by incest are thought to have plagued many royal families in the Middle Ages. 據認為，亂倫引起的遺傳問題困擾著中世紀的許多王室。

The term incest refers to sexual relations between close relatives, especially immediate family members and sometimes first cousins, usually considered taboo. 亂倫一詞指的是近親之間的性關係，特別是直系親屬，有時是堂兄弟姊妹之間的性關係，通常被認為是禁忌。

meaning: 與亂倫有關或參與亂倫。
sentences: If you engaged in an incestuous relationship with a family member, that would make you an inbreeder. 如果您與家庭成員存在亂倫關係，那麼您就會成為近親繁殖者。
The report describes the result as incestuous. 報告將這一結果描述為亂倫。
There are twelve inches in a foot. 一英尺等於十二英吋。
The snow was several inches deep after the storm. 暴風雪過後，積雪有好幾英吋深。
The incidence of the disease has decreased in recent years. 該疾病的發生率近年來有所下降。
The report highlights the high incidence of poverty in the region. 報告強調了該地區高發的貧困現象。
The police are still investigating the cause of the accident. 警方仍在調查那起事故（事件）的原因。
There was a minor incident at the office earlier this morning. 今天一早辦公室發生了一起小事件。

meaning: 鬆散關聯；除間接外，相關性有限；只是偶然相關。
sentences: That character, though colorful, is incidental to the overall plot. 這個角色雖然色彩豐富，但對於整個情節來說是偶然的。
incidental evidence 附帶證據

meaning: 不具核心或關鍵重要性。
sentences: The book discussed the subject, but only incidentally. 這本書討論了這個主題，但只是順便提及。
If someone acts incidentally, they do so in a way that is not of central or critical importance. 如果某人的行為是偶然的，那麼他們的行為方式並不重要或至關重要。

meaning: 切口，尤其是在外科手術中用手術刀或類似醫療工具進行的切口；這種割傷造成的疤痕。
sentences: The term incision refers to a cut, especially one made by a scalpel or similar medical tool in the context of surgical operation; the scar resulting from such a cut. 術語「切口」是指切口，尤其是在外科手術中用手術刀或類似醫療工具進行的切口；這種割傷造成的疤痕。
The lesson introduced incision as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了切口作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The judge was told by the accused that his friends had incited him to commit the crime. 被告告訴法官，他的朋友煽動他犯罪。
incite people to violence 煽动人们实施暴力
The astronomer calculated the inclination of the equator or ecliptic of Earth and the orbital planes of each visible heavenly body. 天文學家計算了地球赤道或​​黃道的傾角以及每個可見天體的軌道平面。
Artillery must take account of a weapon's precise inclination. 火砲必須考慮武器的精確傾角。
The path began to incline steeply as we approached the mountain top. 當我們接近山頂時，路徑開始陡峭地傾斜。
His kind words inclined her to agree with his unusual proposal. 他親切的話語使她傾向於同意他那不同尋常的提案。
The price of the tour includes hotel accommodation and meals. 旅行的價格包含了飯店住宿與餐點。
Does the software package include any additional tutorials? 這個套裝軟體包含了任何額外的教學嗎？
Read the included leaflet for instructions. 請閱讀 隨附的 傳單以取得說明。 請閱讀隨附的傳單以獲取說明。 請閱讀隨附的傳單並取得說明。
The report describes the result as included. 該報告描述了所包含的結果。 該報告描述了所包含的結果。 該報告描述了所包含的結果。
The meaning of 'including' is '包括' in Traditional Chinese. 「including」在繁體中文裡的意思是「包括」。
I found that using 'including' correctly makes your English sound more natural. 我發現正確使用「including」會讓你的英文聽起來更自然。

meaning: 一組、一組或全部的補充或附件。
sentences: The poem was a new inclusion in the textbook. 這首詩被新列入教科書。
The term inclusion refers to an addition or annex to a group, set, or total. 術語「包含」是指一組、一組或全部的新增或附件。
The price of the flight is inclusive of all taxes and baggage fees. 機票價格已包含所有的稅費和行李費。
The organization aims to promote a more inclusive society for everyone. 該組織旨在為每個人推動一個更具包容性的社會。

meaning: 不連貫。沒有邏輯意義；沒有邏輯聯繫或一致性。
sentences: When we confronted her, she gave us a hasty, incoherent explanation. 當我們質問她時，她給了我們一個倉促、語無倫次的解釋。
After just a few drinks, he becomes incoherent. 喝了幾杯之後，他就變得語無倫次了。
Starting your own business can provide a higher income. 自己創業可以提供更高的收入。
High taxes can be a heavy burden for low-income families. 高稅收對低收入家庭來說可能是一個沉重的負擔。

meaning: 即將到來（或即將到來）；到達。
sentences: Incoming tides cause a tidal bore in many rivers. 即將到來的潮汐會導致許多河流出現潮汐。
The report describes the result as incoming. 該報告將結果描述為即將到來。

meaning: 不相容的品質或狀態；不一致；不可調和性。
sentences: The term incompatibility refers to The quality or state of being incompatible; inconsistency; irreconcilability. 術語「不相容性」是指不相容的性質或狀態；不一致；不可調和性。
We learned the meaning of incompatibility during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了不相容的含義。

meaning: 兩件事：不能共存；因為差異而不一致；由於差異而無法一起運作。
sentences: My phone is incompatible with the latest version of this app. 我的手機與此應用程式的最新版本不相容。

Something described as incompatible is of two things: that cannot coexist; not congruous because of differences; unable to function together due to dissimilarities. 被描述為不相容的東西是指兩件事：不能共存；因為差異而不一致；由於差異而無法共同發揮作用。

meaning: 無法執行任務；缺乏能力；無能。
sentences: The term incompetence refers to an inability to perform; a lack of competence; ineptitude. 「無能力」一詞是指沒有能力執行任務；缺乏能力；無能。
The lesson introduced incompetence as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「無能」這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。
The manager was fired for being incompetent. 經理因不稱職而被解雇。
He proved to be incompetent to handle the difficult task. 事實證明他無力處理這項艱巨的任務。
He got four incompletes out of five courses last semester. 上學期他五門課中有四門課未完成。
The term incomplete refers to a designation of being incomplete. 術語“不完整”指的是不完整的指定。

meaning: 沒有結論，沒有得出結論。
sentences: Something described as inconclusive is not conclusive, not leading to a conclusion. 被描述為不確定的事情並不是結論性的，不會得出結論。
The word inconclusive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不確定」這個詞經常用來描述一個人、一件事或情況。
Not replacing the roll after using the last of the toilet paper is very inconsiderate. 用完最後一張衛生紙後不更換捲筒是非常不體貼的。
The report describes the result as inconsiderate. 報告稱此結果是不考慮因素的。

meaning: 不相容（與其他事物）；不相容的, 不一致的, 不一致的。
sentences: His account of the evening was inconsistent with the security-camera footage. 他對當晚的描述與監視器錄影不一致。
Something described as inconsistent is not compatible (with another thing); incompatible, discrepant, at odds. 被描述為不一致的事物（與另一事物）不相容；不相容的，不一致的，不一致的。
The location of the hotel was very inconvenient for us. 飯店的位置對我們來說非常不便。
I apologize for any inconvenient timing. 對於任何不便的時間安排，我深表歉意。
We decided to incorporate several new features into the latest version of the app. 我們決定在最新版本的應用程式中加入（包含）幾項新功能。
The company is planning to incorporate and become a larger business entity. 公司計畫合併（公司化）成為一個更大的業務實體。

meaning: 某物與已經存在的身體的結合；協會;親密的結合；同化。
sentences: After the city's incorporation into the capital district, the population rose. 該市併入首都區後，人口增加。
The term incorporation refers to The union of something with a body already existing; association; intimate union; assimilation. 合併一詞是指某物與已經存在的物體的結合；協會;親密的結合；同化。
The information provided in the report was incorrect. 報告中提供的資訊是錯誤的。
Is this the incorrect spelling of your name? 這是你名字的錯誤拼寫嗎？
I lost a few marks in the test for spelling words incorrectly. 由於單字拼字錯誤，我在考試中丟了幾分。
If someone acts incorrectly, they do so in a way that is in an incorrect manner. 如果某人的行為不正確，他們就會以不正確的方式這樣做。
The number of students in our school has increased this year. 我們學校的學生人數今年增加了。
There has been a significant increase in the price of gold. 金價有了顯著的上漲。
Our team increasings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會increasing這個步驟。
Please increasing the message before noon. 請在中午前increasing訊息。
It's becoming increasingly difficult to find a job in this industry. 在這個產業找工作變得越來越困難。
The situation in the region is becoming increasingly explosive. 該地區的局勢正變得日益緊張。
The sunset was so beautiful that it was a truly incredible view. 日落如此美麗，簡直是一幕真正精彩（極佳的）的景象。
She has an incredible ability to stay calm under intense stress. 她在強大壓力下保持冷靜的能力簡直不可思議（極佳的）。
He was incredibly wealthy. 他非常富有。
If someone acts incredibly, they do so in a way that is to a great extent; extremely. 如果某人的行為令人難以置信，那麼他們在很大程度上是在以某種方式這樣做的。極其。
Employees receive a small salary increment every year. 員工每年都會獲得小幅加薪。
The project will be completed in increments over the next six months. 該專案將在未來六個月內分階段完成。

meaning: 發生在一系列逐漸增量或小步驟中。
sentences: Something described as incremental is occurring over a series of gradual increments, or small steps. 所謂增量的事情是透過一系列逐漸增量或小步驟發生的。
The word incremental is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 增量這個字常用來描述一個人、一個事物或一個情境。

meaning: 坐在蛋上以孵化幼崽；透過任何過程沉思或保持溫暖以發展內在的生命。
sentences: The term incubation refers to sitting on eggs for the purpose of hatching young; a brooding on, or keeping warm, to develop the life within, by any process. 術語「孵化」是指坐在蛋上孵化幼仔；沉思或保持溫暖，以透過任何過程發展內在的生命。
The lesson introduced incubation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了孵化這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用於維持適合反應的環境條件的任何裝置。
sentences: The term incubator refers to any apparatus used to maintain environmental conditions suitable for a reaction. 術語培養箱是指用於維持適合反應的環境條件的任何裝置。
The lesson introduced incubator as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了孵化器作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 目前擔任職位或頭銜；特別是教會的恩惠。
sentences: If the incumbent senator dies, he is replaced by a person appointed by the governor. 如果現任參議員去世，則由州長任命的人接替。
Proper behaviour is incumbent on all holders of positions of trust. 所有受信任職位的持有者都有責任採取正確的行為。
The company is expected to incur significant losses this financial year. 預計公司在本財政年度將蒙受重大損失。
He incurred the wrath of his boss by arriving late for the meeting. 他因開會遲到而招致了老闆的憤怒。

meaning: 不符合傳統道德價值；不適當的、不謙虛的或不體面的。
sentences: Something described as indecent is not in keeping with conventional moral values; improper, immodest, or unseemly. 被描述為不雅的事物不符合傳統的道德價值；不適當的、不謙虛的或不體面的。
The word indecent is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 不雅一詞通常用來形容人、事物或情況。

meaning: 一個人，不果斷，不迅速或果斷。
sentences: They were all being very indecisive about what to wear to the party. 他們對於穿什麼去參加派對都猶豫不決。
The report describes the result as indecisive. 報告稱此結果尚不確定。
Thank you very much; that was indeed a very helpful tip. 非常感謝；那的確是一個非常實用的建議。
He is indeed a very talented musician and a great composer. 他的確是一位非常有才華的音樂家與偉大的作曲家。
The meeting has been postponed for an indefinite period. 會議已無限期推遲。
He gave an indefinite answer to my question. 他對我的問題給出了一個不明確的回答。
an indefinitely determined fossil 不確定的化石
If someone acts indefinitely, they do so in a way that is in a manner that is not definite. 如果某人無限期地行動，他們就會以不確定的方式這樣做。

meaning: 具有難以刪除、除去、沖走、塗抹或抹去的品質。
sentences: This ink spot on the contract is indelible. 合約上的這個墨跡是擦不掉的。
This stain on my shirt is indelible. 我襯衫上的污漬是洗不掉的。
The country celebrated its fiftieth anniversary of independence. 該國慶祝了獨立五十週年。
Financial independence allows you to make your own choices. 財務獨立讓你能夠做出自己的選擇。
She is an independent woman who leads a very active life. 她是一位生活非常積極、獨立的女性。
The study was conducted by an independent research group. 該研究是由一個獨立研究小組進行的。
Both teams worked out the answers independently. 兩個團隊獨立得出答案。
The business partners had radically different ideas for the company, and each decided to work on a project independently of the other. 業務夥伴對公司的想法截然不同，每個人都決定獨立進行一個專案。
He proved it with indescribable mathematics. 他用難以形容的數學證明了這一點。
The report describes the result as indescribable. 報告稱這項結果難以形容。
The consumer price index shows that the cost of living has increased recently. 消費者物價指數顯示最近生活成本有所增加。
Please check the index at the back of the book to find specific topics and names. 請查看書後的索引以查找特定主題和名稱。

meaning: 為某些內容建立索引的過程。
sentences: Minimizing the number of indexings will make the algorithm more efficient. 最小化索引數量將使演算法更有效率。
The term indexing refers to The process by which something is indexed. 術語「索引」是指對某些內容建立索引的過程。
The latest data indicate that the economy is recovering. 最新數據顯示經濟正在復甦。
Please indicate your preference on the application form. 請在申請表上標明您的偏好。
The latest data provide a clear indication of economic recovery. 最新數據提供了經濟復甦的明確指示（跡象）。
Is there any indication that the policy is actually working now? 有任何跡象（指示）表明這項政策現在確實在起作用嗎？

meaning: 作為某事的標誌、指示或建議。
sentences: He had pains indicative of a heart attack. 他的疼痛預示著心臟病發作。
Something described as indicative is serving as a sign, indication or suggestion of something. 指示性的東西是作為某事的標誌、指示或建議。
Stock market performance is often seen as an indicator of the economy. 股市表現常被視為經濟的指標。
The warning light on the indicator panel started to blink. 儀表板上的警告燈開始閃爍。
a book that indicts modern values 一本控訴現代價值的書
People often indict when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時提出起訴。

meaning: 失敗或表現不佳的證據。
sentences: an indictment of his ability to lead 對他領導能力的控訴
an indictment of his game 對他的比賽的控訴
The manager's total indifference to the problem frustrated the entire team. 經理對問題的完全漠不關心讓整個團隊感到沮喪。
She showed complete indifference to the news and didn't say a word. 她對這則消息表現得完全冷淡，一句話也沒說。
He seemed completely indifferent to the news and didn't show any emotion. 他似乎對這則消息完全漠不關心，沒有表現出任何情感。
The food at the hotel was rather indifferent, and we were quite disappointed. 飯店的食物相當平庸（一般），我們感到很失望。
The museum has a large collection of art from indigenous cultures around the world. 這家博物館收藏了大量來自世界各地土著（原住民）文化的藝術品。
The kangaroo is a species of animal that is indigenous to Australia. 袋鼠是澳洲特有（本地）的一種動物。
Eating too quickly can cause indigestion. 吃得太快會引起消化不良。
He took some medicine to relieve his painful indigestion. 他吃了一些藥來緩解痛苦的消化不良。
The local residents were indignant about the government's new policy. 當地居民對政府的新政策感到憤慨。
He gave an indignant reply when he was accused of being dishonest. 當被指控不誠實時，他做出了憤怒的回覆。
The decision sparked a wave of indignation across the country. 該決定引發了全國性的憤慨浪潮。
She spoke with a sense of indignation in her voice. 她說話時語氣中帶著一絲憤慨。

meaning: 綠色的深藍色；靛藍染料的顏色。
sentences: The term indigo refers to a greenish dark blue color; the color of indigo dye. 術語「靛藍」是指帶綠色的深藍色；靛藍染料的顏色。
The lesson introduced indigo as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了靛藍作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The policy will have an indirect effect on the economy. 該政策將對經濟產生間接影響。
He took an indirect route to avoid the traffic jam. 他走了一條間接路線以避開交通堵塞。
His alcoholism had a direct effect on his health, and indirectly caused problems for others. 他的酗酒直接影響了他的健康，也間接為別人帶來了問題。
If someone acts indirectly, they do so in a way that is in an indirect manner. 如果某人間接行事，他們就會以間接的方式這樣做。
How can anyone be so indiscriminate in making friends as he is? 怎麼會有人像他這樣不分青紅皂白交朋友呢？
The report describes the result as indiscriminate. 報告稱這一結果是不分皂白的。
Smartphones have become an indispensable tool for communication in our daily lives. 智慧型手機已成為我們日常生活中必不可少的通訊工具。
She is an indispensable member of the team and has a deep understanding of the project. 她是團隊中不可或缺（必不可少）的一員。

meaning: 沒有明確定義或沒有清晰的輪廓；微弱或暗淡。
sentences: indistinct sign 模糊的跡象
Something described as indistinct is not clearly defined or not having a sharp outline; faint or dim. 形容不明確的事物，是指沒有明確的界線或沒有清晰的輪廓；微弱或暗淡。
Each individual student in the class has unique talents. 班上的每一位學生都擁有獨特的才華。
The company provides customized services for individuals. 公司為個人提供量身打造的服務。

meaning: 作為個體，分別地、獨立地。
sentences: individually assessed 單獨評估
rate the group individually 分別為小組評分

meaning: 灌輸思想；反覆灌輸特定觀念。
sentences: The documentary examines how children can be influenced by political indoctrination. 那部紀錄片探討孩子如何受到政治灌輸的影響。
Good education should encourage critical thinking, not indoctrination. 良好的教育應該鼓勵批判思考，而不是灌輸思想。
His failure was caused by his natural indolence and lack of ambition. 他的失敗是由於他天生的怠惰和缺乏抱負。
She struggled to overcome her indolence and finish the work. 她努力克服自己的懶散以完成工作。
The indolent student spent the afternoon watching television instead of studying. 那個懶惰的學生下午都在看電視而不是學習。
He is a bit indolent and rarely helps with the housework. 他有點懶散，很少幫忙做家事。
The hotel has a beautiful indoor swimming pool for its guests. 飯店有一個供住客使用的漂亮室內泳池。
I prefer to engage in indoor activities like reading and music. 我比較喜歡從事室內活動，如閱讀與音樂。
It's raining outside, so the children decided to play indoors. 外面在下雨，所以孩子們決定在室內玩耍。
Please remember to keep your pets indoors during the storm. 暴風雨期間請記得將寵物留在室內。
The doctor needed to induce labor because the baby was already overdue. 由於寶寶已經過期，醫生需要進行催產（誘導分娩）。
High interest rates can induce businesses to reduce their investments. 高利率會誘導企業減少投資。
a drug- induced coma 藥物引起的昏迷
a radiation- induced disease 輻射引起的疾病

meaning: 一個人被任命擔任職務或服兵役的正式儀式。
sentences: The term induction refers to a formal ceremony in which a person is appointed to an office or into military service. 就職一詞是指一個人被任命擔任職務或服兵役的正式儀式。
The lesson introduced induction as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了歸納法作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
On the weekend, I like to indulge in a long hot bath and a good book. 週末時，我喜歡沈溺於（享受）長時間的熱水澡和一本好書。
They decided to indulge their children and buy them all the toys they wanted. 他們決定放任（滿足）孩子，買下他們想要的所有玩具。
Reading is my favorite indulgence. 閱讀是我最喜歡的愛好（沈溺之事）。
The hotel provides luxury and indulgence for its guests. 這家飯店為客人提供奢華與享受。
The grandparents are very indulgent with their grandchildren. 祖父母非常溺愛他們的孫子。
She gave him an indulgent smile after he made the mistake. 在他犯錯後，她對他露出了寬容（縱容）的微笑。
The city is a major industrial center with many large factories. 這座城市是一個擁有許多大型工廠的主要工業中心。
Recent industrial developments have significantly changed the city. 最近的工業發展已顯著改變了這座城市。
The country began to industrialize rapidly in the mid-20th century. 該國在 20 世紀中葉開始迅速工業化。
The government is trying to industrialize the northern regions of the country. 政府正試圖使該國北部地區工業化。
She is an industrious worker who always finishes her tasks on time. 她是一位勤奮的員工，總能準時完成任務。
The ants are known for being very industrious insects. 螞蟻以非常勤奮的昆蟲著稱。
He works as a software engineer in the tech industry. 他在科技產業擔任軟體工程師。
The tourism industry has experienced rapid growth lately. 旅遊業最近經歷了快速增長。

meaning: 獨立、無附屬關係（特別是不附屬於主要組織或公司）。
sentences: Something described as indy is independent, unaffiliated (especially not affiliated with a major organization or company). 被描述為 indy 的東西是獨立的、不隸屬於的（特別是不隸屬於主要組織或公司）。
The word indy is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. indy 這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 沒有達到預期的效果；無效的；奧蒂塞。
sentences: Something described as ineffective is not having the desired effect; ineffectual; otiose. 所謂無效的事情是指沒有達到預期的效果；無效的；奧蒂塞。
The word ineffective is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 無效這個字常用來描述一個人、一件事或情況。

meaning: 軟弱、優柔寡斷；缺乏力度。
sentences: Our group leader proved highly ineffectual, caving to every whim put forth by the other members. 事實證明，我們的組長非常無能，總是屈服於其他成員提出的每一個突發奇想。
The report describes the result as ineffectual. 報告稱該結果無效。

meaning: 效率不高；沒有產生預期或期望的效果；無效的。
sentences: Celery is an inefficient food. 芹菜是一種低效食物。
Something described as inefficient is not efficient; not producing the effect intended or desired; inefficacious. 被描述為低效率的東西實際上是沒有效率的；沒有產生預期或期望的效果；無效。

meaning: 不符合資格；禁止做某事。
sentences: Employees of the promoter are ineligible to enter the competition. 主辦單位的員工沒有資格參加比賽。
Something described as ineligible is not eligible; forbidden to do something. 被描述為不合格的事物不符合資格；禁止做某事。
The government's response to the crisis was slow and inept. 政府對這場危機的回應緩慢且無能。
He is completely inept at handling tools. 他完全不擅長（笨拙地）使用工具。
His ineptitude led to several serious mistakes on the project. 他的無能導致專案中出現了幾次嚴重錯誤。
The company failed due to the management's sheer ineptitude. 由於管理層極度無能，公司倒閉了。

meaning: 不平等的條件或狀態（社會、文化或法律事務）；尤其是這樣的條件也是不公平的。
sentences: The inequality in living standards led to a civil war as the have-nots rebelled. 生活水準的不平等導致了窮人反抗而引發的內戰。

The term inequality refers to a condition or state (of social, cultural, or legal matters) that is not equal; especially, such a condition that is thereby also unfair. 不平等一詞是指不平等的條件或狀態（社會、文化或法律事務）；尤其是這樣的條件也是不公平的。

meaning: 無法 移動 或 無生命 。
sentences: The report describes the result as inert. 該報告將結果描述為惰性。 該報告將結果描述為惰性。 該報告將結果描述為星巴克。
Everyone noticed the inert tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的惰性語氣。 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的惰性語氣。 每個人都注意到了這個訊息的指定語氣。

meaning: 物體抵抗等速運動發生任何變化的特性；相當於它的質量。
sentences: The term inertia refers to the property of a body that resists any change to its uniform motion; equivalent to its mass. 術語「慣性」是指物體抵抗等速運動發生任何變化的特性。相當於它的品質。
The lesson introduced inertia as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了慣性這個易於理解的有用術語。
It was inevitable that the two countries would eventually go to war. 兩國最終走向戰爭是不可避免的。
Changes in the market are inevitable, and businesses must learn to adapt. 市場變化是必然的，企業必須學會適應。

meaning: 照常;可預見地；正如預期的那樣。
sentences: Inevitably, the next-door neighbour began to mow his lawn just as she lays down her head after a long night shift. 不可避免的是，當她結束了漫長的夜班後，正當她低下頭時，隔壁鄰居開始修剪草坪。
The child inevitably began to cry when his mother went to work. 當他媽媽去上班時，孩子不可避免地開始哭泣。

meaning: 花費很少；價格合理；便宜。
sentences: Something described as inexpensive is involving little expense; reasonable in price; cheap. 被描述為廉價的東西是指花費很少；價格合理；便宜的。
The word inexpensive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「便宜」這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
I failed to get the job due to inexperience. 由於缺乏經驗，我未能得到這份工作。
The term inexperience refers to A lack of experience. 「缺乏經驗」一詞是指缺乏經驗。

meaning: 沒有經驗；因為缺乏經驗，所以缺乏知識。
sentences: Veteran Wiktionary editors frustrated with inexperienced newcomers should remember that they were once in that position. 對缺乏經驗的新人感到沮喪的資深維基字典編輯應該記住，他們曾經處於這個位置。
The report describes the result as inexperienced. 報告稱此結果缺乏經驗。
Something described as inexplicable is impossible to explain; not easily accounted for. 形容為莫名其妙的事情是無法解釋的；不容易被佔。
The word inexplicable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 無法解釋這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 以一種莫名其妙的方式；出於未知的原因。
sentences: If someone acts inexplicably, they do so in a way that is in an inexplicable manner; for an unknown reason. 如果某人的行為令人費解，那麼他們以一種令人費解的方式這樣做；出於未知原因。
The speaker responded inexplicably during the discussion. 說話者在討論中做出了莫名其妙的回應。

meaning: 沒有過錯或弱點；不能犯錯或謬誤。
sentences: He knows about many things, but even he is not infallible. 他知道很多事情，但即使他也不是絕對正確的。
Something described as infallible is without fault or weakness; incapable of error or fallacy. 被描述為無誤的事物是指沒有過失或弱點；不能犯錯或謬誤。

meaning: 名聲不好；聲譽不佳的；臭名昭著;不愉快或邪惡的；廣為人知，尤其是對於一些輕蔑的事情。
sentences: He was an infamous traitor. 他是個臭名昭著的叛徒。
She is infamous for perjury. 她因作偽證而臭名昭著。

meaning: 任何事物發展的早期階段。
sentences: Space tourism is still in its infancy. 太空旅遊仍處於起步階段。
The term infancy refers to an early stage in the development of anything. 嬰兒期一詞指的是任何事物發展的早期階段。
The mother was tenderly caring for her young and fragile infant. 母親正溫柔地照料著她那年幼脆弱的嬰兒。
The hospital has a specialized unit for newborn and sick infants. 醫院有一個專門負責新生兒與患病嬰兒的單位。

meaning: 步行（在陸地上）作戰的士兵，而不是騎兵和其他騎兵部隊，無論外部運輸如何（例如空降）。
sentences: The term infantry refers to soldiers who fight on foot (on land), as opposed to cavalry and other mounted units, regardless of external transport (e.g. airborne). 步兵一詞是指步行（在陸地上）作戰的士兵，而不是騎兵和其他騎兵部隊，無論外部運輸如何（例如空降）。
The lesson introduced infantry as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了步兵這個易於理解的有用術語。
He is completely infatuated with his new girlfriend. 他完全迷戀上了他的新女朋友。
She was infatuated with the idea of moving to Hollywood. 她迷戀於搬到好萊塢的想法。
Their romance was just a brief infatuation. 他們的戀情只是一時短暫的迷戀。
His infatuation with fast cars led him into a lot of trouble. 他對跑車的迷戀讓他陷入了許多麻煩。
The dangerous virus can quickly infect a large number of people in crowded places. 這種危險病毒在擁擠的地方會迅速傳染給大量人群。
His enthusiasm for the project began to infect the entire team. 他對專案的熱情開始感染（帶動）整個團隊。
The doctor prescribed some medicine to treat her lung infection. 醫生開了一些藥來治療她的肺部感染。
You should keep the wound clean to avoid any serious infection. 妳應該保持傷口清潔，以避免任何嚴重的感染。
The common cold is highly infectious and spreads easily in schools. 普通感冒極具傳染性，在學校裡很容易傳播。
His enthusiastic laugh was infectious, and soon everyone was smiling. 他熱情的笑聲很有感染力，很快每個人都露出了微笑。
What can we infer from the research findings about future trends? 從研究結果中我們可以推斷出關於未來趨勢的什麼資訊？
It is difficult to infer his true feelings from his neutral expression. 很難從他中性的表情中推斷出他的真實感受。

meaning: 推論出來的；來自另一個被承認或被認為是真實的真理或命題；結論；扣除。
sentences: The term inference refers to that which is inferred; a truth or proposition drawn from another which is admitted or supposed to be true; a conclusion; a deduction. 術語「推論」是指推論出來的事物；來自另一個被承認或被認為是真實的真理或命題；結論；扣除。
The lesson introduced inference as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了推理作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The quality of the new model was found to be inferior to the old. 新型號的品質被發現不如（劣於）舊款。
He often felt inferior to his elder brother, who was very successful. 他常覺得自己不如他那位非常成功的哥哥。
The inferno ripped through the forest, destroying anything in its path. 地獄之火席捲了森林，摧毀了沿途的一切。
The term inferno refers to a large fire; a conflagration. 地獄一詞指的是一場大火；一場大火。

meaning: 不孕不育的情況；生育能力差。
sentences: Soil infertility is a major problem for farmers. 土壤貧瘠是農民面臨的一個主要問題。
The term infertility refers to the condition of being infertile; of having poor fertility. 不孕症一詞是指不孕不育的狀況；生育能力差。

meaning: 對其他道德義務的不忠。
sentences: The term infidelity refers to unfaithfulness in some other moral obligation. 不忠一詞是指對其他一些道德義務的不忠。
The lesson introduced infidelity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了不忠作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Let’s keep this problem in the infield. 讓我們把這個問題留在內場吧。
The term infield refers to A constrained scope or area. 術語“內場”是指受限制的範圍或區域。
The spy infiltrated the high-tech company and stole many secrets. 間諜潛入高科技公司並竊取了許多機密。
To infiltrate means to surreptitiously penetrate, enter or gain access to. 滲透意味著秘密地滲透、進入或進入。

meaning: 地表水進入土壤的過程。
sentences: The term infiltration refers to process by which water on the ground surface enters the soil. 滲透一詞是指地表的水進入土壤的過程。
The lesson introduced infiltration as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了滲透作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Scientists believe that the universe is infinite and continues to expand. 科學家相信宇宙是無限的，並且在不斷擴張。
She showed infinite patience while teaching the young children how to play the piano. 她在教小孩子彈鋼琴時展現了無窮的（無限的）耐心。
He is infinitely more capable than John. 他比約翰更有能力。
If someone acts infinitely, they do so in a way that is to a surpassingly large extent. 如果某人的行為是無限的，那麼他們的行為方式就達到了極大的程度。

meaning: 無止盡、無限、沒有開始、結束或大小限制。
sentences: concept of infinity 無窮大的概念
The desert stretched out toward the horizon as if into infinity. 沙漠向地平線延伸，彷彿無邊無際。
The elderly lady was becoming increasingly infirm and needed help. 那位老婦人變得越來越虛弱，需要幫助。
The hospital provides care for the sick and infirm. 這家醫院為病弱者提供照護。

meaning: 照顧病人或受傷人員的地方，尤其是小型醫院；病房。
sentences: The term infirmary refers to a place where sick or injured people are cared for, especially a small hospital; sickhouse. 醫務室是指照顧病人或受傷人員的地方，尤指小型醫院；病房。
The lesson introduced infirmary as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了醫務室這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The medicine will help to reduce the inflammation in your joints. 這藥將有助於減輕你關節的發炎。
Redness and swelling are common signs of inflammation. 紅腫是發炎的常見跡象。

meaning: 傾向於激怒或激怒某人。
sentences: Sam posted an inflammatory comment to the newsgroup. 薩姆在新聞組上發表了煽動性評論。
Something described as inflammatory is tending to inflame or provoke somebody. 被描述為發炎的東西往往會激怒或激怒某人。
Something described as inflatable is able to be inflated or blown up. 被描述為可充氣的東西是能夠被充氣或炸毀的。
The word inflatable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 充氣這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。
You need a pump to inflate the bicycle tires. 你需要一個幫浦來為自行車輪胎充氣。
The government is trying to inflate the economy through spending. 政府正試圖透過支出來刺激（膨脹）經濟。
The economist predicted a significant drop in the inflation rate. 經濟學家預測通膨（通貨膨脹）率將大幅下降。
High rates of inflation managing to affect the local economy now. 高通膨率現在竟然（能）影響到了當地經濟。

meaning: 導致或可能導致通貨膨脹。
sentences: The rapid influx of precious metals from the new mines had an inflationary effect on the specie based economy. 新礦山中貴金屬的迅速湧入對以貨幣為基礎的經濟產生了通貨膨脹影響。
The report describes the result as inflationary. 該報告將這一結果描述為通貨膨脹。
We discussed the term inflect in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 inflect 這個詞。
The article mentioned inflect in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 inflect。

meaning: 適用於給定類別術語的任何特定類型的形態變異。
sentences: The second-person imperative is a verbal inflection found in many Indo-European languages. 第二人稱命令是許多印歐語言中的動詞變化。
The term inflection refers to Any specific type of morphological variation, which applies to a given class of terms. 術語詞形變化是指任何特定類型的形態變化，適用於給定類別的術語。
The heavy storm inflicted significant damage on the coastal village. 強風暴給海濱村莊造成了重大損失（使遭受損失）。
The government decided to inflict strict penalties on anyone who violates the law. 政府決定對任何違反法律的人處以嚴厲處罰（施加處罰）。

meaning: 任何流入或流入的東西。
sentences: The inflow of air. 空氣的流入。
The term inflow refers to Anything which flows in or into. 術語「流入」是指流入或流入的任何事物。
Her parents have had a great influence on her life choices. 她的父母對她的人生選擇產生了極大的影響。
The social media influencer shared her travel experiences. 社交媒體影響者分享了她的旅行經歷。
She is a highly influential leader in the global tech industry. 她是全球科技產業中一位極具影響力（有影響）的領導者。
The book manages to be highly influential in the field of science. 這本書在科學領域竟然（能）具有極大的影響力。
Many people catch influenza during the winter months. 許多人在冬季會得流感。
The government recommended getting an influenza vaccine. 政府建議接種流感疫苗。

meaning: 向內或向某物流動；一個進來。
sentences: I'll buy a new computer when I get an influx of cash. 當我有足夠的現金時，我會買一台新電腦。
The term influx refers to a flow inward or into something; a coming in. 流入一詞是指向內流動或流入某物；進來。
Please inform the manager about the change in the meeting time. 請告知經理會議時間的變動。
The system will automatically inform users when the task is done. 當任務完成時，系統會自動通知使用者。
an informal agreement 非正式協議
Something described as informal is not in accord with the usual regulations. 被描述為非正式的事物不符合通常的規定。

meaning: 以不規則或非正式的方式；沒有通常的形式。
sentences: informally dressed 穿着不正式
speak informally 非正式地說話

meaning: 向某人（尤其是警察）傳遞機密資訊的人；告密者。
sentences: The term informant refers to one who relays confidential information to someone, especially to the police; an informer. 線人一詞是指向某人（尤其是警察）傳遞機密資訊的人；告密者。
The lesson introduced informant as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了線人這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
You can find more information about the course on our website. 您可以在我們的網站上找到更多關於該課程的資訊。
The police are still gathering information about the accident. 警方仍在收集關於該起事故的資訊。

meaning: 旨在或能夠傳遞訊息；擁有訊息。
sentences: The subway map was quite informational, allowing us to determine the most efficient route to our destination. 地鐵地圖資訊豐富，使我們能夠確定到達目的地的最有效路線。
The report describes the result as informational. 該報告將結果描述為僅供參考。
The television program about nature was very informative today. 那個關於大自然的電視節目今天非常具有資訊（資訊豐富的）性。
Please provide an informative summary of the project's progress. 請提供一份關於專案進度的內容豐富的摘要。

meaning: 受指示；了解某一事實或教育領域。
sentences: An informed young man delivered a lecture on the history of modern art. 一位見多識廣的年輕人發表了關於現代藝術史的講座。
The report describes the result as informed. 該報告描述了結果。

meaning: 向 當局 舉報 不當 或 非法活動的人。
sentences: Being an informer often meant living in fear. 成為 告密者 通常意味著生活在恐懼之中。 成為告密者常常意味著生活在恐懼之中。 成為告密者通常意味著生活在恐懼之中。
The police relied on an informer to catch the gang. 警方依靠 線人 抓獲了該團夥。 警方依靠線人抓獲了該團夥。 警方依靠線路人抓獲了該團夥。
Even stealing a pack of gum is an infraction in the eyes of the law. 從法律的角度來看，即使是偷一包口香糖也是違法行為。
The term infraction refers to A minor offence, petty crime. 違規一詞是指輕微犯罪、輕微犯罪。
The government is investing more money in improving the national infrastructure. 政府正在投入更多資金來改善國家基礎設施。
Good infrastructure, such as roads and bridges, is essential for economic growth. 良好的基礎設施，如道路和橋樑，對於經濟增長至關重要。
The term infringement refers to a violation or breach, as of a law. 侵權一詞是指違反或違反法律。
The lesson introduced infringement as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了侵權這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 由液體組成的產品，其中浸有其他成分以提取有用的品質。
sentences: An extract of rooibos and chamomile makes a refreshing infusion. 路易波士茶和洋甘菊萃取物可製成清爽的沖泡液。
The term infusion refers to a product consisting of a liquid which has had other ingredients steeped in it to extract useful qualities. 輸液一詞是指由液體組成的產品，其中浸泡有其他成分以提取有用的品質。
He came up with an ingenious solution to the problem. 他想出了一個精妙的解決方案。
The machine has an ingenious design that makes it very efficient. 這台機器有著精巧的設計，使其效率很高。
The project was a success thanks to the team's creativity and ingenuity. 由於團隊的創造力和靈巧，該專案取得了成功。
The traditional craft shows a high level of artistic ingenuity. 這項傳統工藝展現了極高的藝術獨創性。

meaning: 使（不需要的物體或液體）進入發動機，通常會通過進氣口。
sentences: The plane's engine ingested a large bird and flamed out. 飛機的引擎吞下了一隻大鳥並熄火了。
People often ingest when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時攝取。
Garlic is a key ingredient in many delicious Italian dishes now. 大蒜現在是許多美味義大利菜的主要食材（成分）。
Trust and communication are the winning ingredients for marriage. 信任與溝通是幸福婚姻成功的要素（成分）。
Several rare species of animals continue to inhabit the remote forest. 幾種稀有動物繼續棲息在這片偏遠的森林中。
The ancient ruins were once inhabited by a powerful civilization. 這些古代遺址曾由一個強大的文明居住。
The small island has only fifty permanent inhabitants and is very quiet. 這個小島只有五十名常住居民，非常安靜。
The researchers studied the daily lives of the mountain inhabitants. 研究人員研究了山區居民的日常生活。
The doctor told the patient to inhale deeply and then exhale slowly. 醫生告訴病人深吸氣，然後慢慢呼氣。
Don't inhale the smoke from the fire. 不要吸入火災產生的煙霧。
There are several risks inherent in any new business venture. 任何新的商業冒險都有其固有的風險。
She has an inherent talent for music and started playing the violin at four. 她有著與生俱來的（內在的）音樂才華，四歲就開始拉小提琴了。

meaning: 以一種固有的方式；自然地，天生地。
sentences: If someone acts inherently, they do so in a way that is in an inherent way; naturally, innately. 如果某人的行為是與生俱來的，那麼他們就是以一種與生俱來的方式這樣做的。自然地，天生地。
The speaker responded inherently during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中做出了固有的回應。
He expected to inherit a large fortune from his wealthy grandfather. 他期望能從富有的祖父那裡繼承一大筆財產。
She inherited her mother's beautiful blue eyes and artistic talent. 她遺傳了母親美麗的藍眼睛和藝術天賦。
The siblings argued over their father's inheritance. 兄弟姐妹們為父親的遺產而爭論。
The ancient temple is a magnificent cultural inheritance. 這座古廟是一份瑰麗的文化遺產。
Fear can inhibit people from trying new things. 恐懼會抑制人們嘗試新事物。
The drug is designed to inhibit the growth of cancer cells. 該藥物旨在抑制癌細胞的生長。

meaning: 一種個人的恐懼或尷尬的感覺，使人無法自然地表現。
sentences: The term inhibition refers to a personal feeling of fear or embarrassment that stops one behaving naturally. 抑制一詞指的是一種個人的恐懼或尷尬的感覺，這種感覺阻止了一個人的自然行為。
The lesson introduced inhibition as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了抑制這個易於理解的有用術語。
I found daily meditation to be a useful inhibitor of negative thoughts. 我發現每天冥想可以有效抑制負面想法。
The term inhibitor refers to one who, or that which, inhibits. 術語「抑制劑」指的是抑制者或抑制者。

meaning: 屬於或關於不人道及其帶來的冷漠殘忍、虐待狂或野蠻行為。
sentences: Something described as inhuman is of or pertaining to inhumanity and the indifferently cruel, sadistic or barbaric behavior it brings. 被描述為不人道的事物屬於或與不人道及其帶來的冷漠殘忍、虐待狂或野蠻行為有關。
The word inhuman is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「不人道」這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The project required a significant amount of initial investment. 該專案需要大量的初期（最初的）投資。
Our initial reaction to the news was a sense of shock and doubt. 我們對該消息的最初反應是震驚與懷疑。
Initially, I found city life incredibly difficult, but now I'm used to it. 最初，我發現城市生活非常困難，但現在我已經習慣了。
If someone acts initially, they do so in a way that is at the beginning. 如果某人最初採取行動，他們就會以一開始的方式行事。
The company decided to initiate a new marketing campaign to boost sales. 公司決定發起一項新的行銷活動以提振銷售額。
We need to initiate a discussion about the future of the project. 我們需要就專案的未來展開（發起）一場討論。

meaning: 發起的行為，或被發起或引入的過程。
sentences: initiation into a society 進入社會
initiation into business 開始創業
She showed a lot of initiative by organizing the community festival. 她透過組織社區節慶展現了極大的主動性（首創精神）。
The government has taken the initiative to address the problem of air pollution. 政府已採取主動（採取首創舉措）來應對空氣污染問題。
The doctor needed to inject the medicine directly into the patient's bloodstream. 醫生需要將藥物直接注射到病人的血液中。
The new manager tried to inject more energy and enthusiasm into the team. 新經理試圖為團隊注入（引入）更多活力和熱情。
He received a flu injection yesterday to protect himself during the winter. 他昨天接受了流感疫苗注射，以便在冬天保護自己。
The company received a large injection of capital from an anonymous investor. 公司收到了一位匿名投資者的大量資金注入。

meaning: 禁止的行為；指示、命令或禁止的行為。
sentences: The term injunction refers to the act of enjoining; the act of directing, commanding, or prohibiting. 禁令一詞是指命令的行為；指示、命令或禁止的行為。
The lesson introduced injunction as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了禁令作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
He managed to injure his leg while playing basketball yesterday. 他昨天打籃球時竟然弄傷了（損傷）腿。
Be careful not to injure yourself when using these sharp tools. 使用這些鋒利工具時小心別傷到（損傷）自己。
He suffered a serious leg injury during the championship match. 他在冠軍賽中受了嚴重的腿傷。
Regular exercise can help to reduce the risk of sports injuries. 定期運動有助於降低運動損傷的風險。
The organization works to fight against social injustice and poverty. 該組織致力於打擊社會不公（不公平）和貧困。

meaning: 勇於創新的人；新想法的創造者。
sentences: The term innovator refers to someone who innovates; a creator of new ideas. 創新者一詞指的是進行創新的人；新想法的創造者。
The lesson introduced innovator as a useful term to understand. The lesson introduced innovator as a useful term to understand.

meaning: 因治療需要在醫院住至少一晚的病人；住院病人。

sentences: During the meeting, Jake turned into an inquisitor, firing questions at the presenter non-stop. 會議期間，傑克化身詢問者，不停地向主持人提問。

meaning: 在很大程度上；非常喜歡。
sentences: That ramp is insanely difficult to jump. 那個坡道很難跳。

meaning: 無法滿足；無法滿足或安撫；非常貪心。
sentences: Something described as insatiable is not satiable; incapable of being satisfied or appeased; very greedy. 形容為貪得無厭的東西，其實是無法滿足的；無法滿足或安撫；非常貪心。

meaning: 對自己或在某些情況下不舒服或不自信。

meaning: 不表達正常的情緒感受；冰冷的;不圓滑；不外交的。

an insulated house or column 隔熱的房屋或柱子
The report describes the result as insulated. 報告將結果描述為“絕緣”。

meaning: 絕緣行為；與其他物體分離；隔離。
sentences: The term insulation refers to the act of insulating; detachment from other objects; isolation. 術語「絕緣」是指絕緣的行為；與其他物體分離；隔離。
The lesson introduced insulation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了絕緣這個易於理解的有用術語。
Diabetes patients often need regular injections of insulin. 糖尿病患者通常需要定期注射胰島素。
The body produces insulin to regulate blood sugar levels. 人體產生胰島素來調節血糖水平。
She felt a sense of deep insult after his rude behavior today. 聽到他今天粗魯的行為後，她感到受到了深深的侮辱。
Don't try to insult people; try to stay polite and professional. 不要試圖侮辱人；試著保持禮貌且專業。

meaning: 包含 侮辱 ，或有侮辱的意圖。
sentences: He received an insulting letter. 他收到了一封 侮辱性 信。 他收到一封侮辱性的信。 他收到了一封侮辱性信。
The report describes the result as insulting. 報告稱這項結果是侮辱性的。 報告稱這項結果是侮辱性的。 報告稱這是侮辱性的。
I need to buy a high-quality health insurance policy for my trip. 我需要為我的旅行買一份高品質的醫療保險。
The company provides professional liability insurance for its team. 公司為其團隊提供專業責任保險。

meaning: 如果發生某些特定風險，則提供補償。保單（合約）通常同意在發生事故、盜竊或其他不良事件時提供經濟補償。
sentences: I'm not insured against burglary. 我沒有入室竊盜保險。

To insure means to provide for compensation if some specified risk occurs. Often agreed by policy (contract) to offer financial compensation in case of an accident, theft or other undesirable event. 保險是指在發生某些特定風險時提供賠償。政策（合約）通常同意在發生事故、盜竊或其他不良事件時提供經濟補償。
After the accident I contacted the insurer who paid for the repairs. 事故發生後，我聯繫了一家支付維修費用的保險公司。
The term insurer refers to one who insures. 保險人一詞是指提供保險的人。
suppress the insurgency by isolating the rebels from the rest of the population 透過將叛亂分子與其他民眾隔離來鎮壓叛亂
The term insurgency refers to rebellion; revolt; the state of being insurgent. 叛亂一詞指的是叛亂；反叛;處於叛亂狀態。

meaning: 拿起武器反對當地國家當局的幾個人之一；叛亂參與者。
sentences: The term insurgent refers to one of several people who take up arms against the local state authority; a participant in insurgency. 叛亂分子一詞是指拿起武器反對當地國家當局的幾個人之一；叛亂參與者。
The lesson introduced insurgent as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了叛亂分子作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 無法被超越、超越或克服；不可逾越
sentences: Getting everybody to agree proved to be an insurmountable difficulty. 事實證明，讓每個人都同意是一個難以克服的困難。
The report describes the result as insurmountable. 報告稱這項結果是難以克服的。
Despite the heavy storm, the small wooden cottage remained completely intact. 儘管風暴很大，那座小木屋依然完好無損。
The ancient ruins were found mostly intact by the team of archaeologists. 考古學家團隊發現這些古代遺址大部分都保存完好。
Reducing your salt intake can help to lower your blood pressure. 減少鹽的攝取有助於降低血壓。
The school is expecting a large intake of new students this semester. 學校預計這學期將招收（吸納）大量新生。

meaning: 無法被感官感知；無形的。
sentences: Something described as intangible is incapable of being perceived by the senses; incorporeal. 被描述為無形的東西是無法被感官感知的；無形的。
The word intangible is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 無形這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。
An integer is a whole number like 1, 2, 3, or -1, -2, -3. 整數是一個像 1、2、3 或 -1、-2、-3 的數。
The results were provided as a list of integers. 結果以整數列表的形式提供。

meaning: 不定積分：將此運算與不定域一起應用在函數上的結果，產生一個函數；函數的反導數；。
sentences: The integral of x 2 {\displaystyle x^{2}} is x 3 3 {\displaystyle {\frac {x^{3}}{3}}} plus a constant. x 2 {\displaystyle x^{2}} 的點數是 x 3 3 {\displaystyle {\frac {x^{3}}{3}}} 加上一個常數。

The term integral refers to an indefinite integral: the result of the application of such an operation onto a function together with an indefinite domain, yielding a function; a function's antiderivative;. 術語「積分」是指不定積分：將此類運算與不定域一起應用於函數的結果，產生函數；函數的反導數；。
The new software is designed to integrate seamlessly with existing systems. 這款新軟體旨在與現有系統無縫整合（結合）。
It took some time for the new students to integrate into the community. 新學生花了一些時間才融入社區。
The new system features an integrated approach to data management. 新系統具有整合的數據管理方法。
The school is working to create an integrated environment for all students. 學校正致力於為所有學生營造一個整合的環境。
The economic integration of the region has led to increased trade and growth. 該地區的經濟一體化（整合）導致了貿易和增長的增加。
The project aims to promote social integration among different ethnic groups. 該專案旨在促進不同族群之間的社會融合。
He is a man of great integrity who always keeps his word and does the right thing. 他是一個非常正直（誠實）的人，總是守信並做正確的事。
The engineers checked the structural integrity of the bridge after the earthquake. 工程師在地震後檢查了橋樑的結構完整性。
He is a man of great intellect and has published many scientific books. 他是一位才智過人的人，出版了許多科學著作。
The program aims to challenge the intellect and creativity of the students. 該計畫旨在挑戰學生的智力和創造力。
She took a deep interest in intellectual property law at college. 她在大學對知識（知識分子）產權法產生了濃厚興趣。
The university aims to promote intellectual growth and research. 該大學旨在推廣知識（知識分子）成長與研究。
Artificial intelligence is a rapidly evolving field with potential. 人工智慧（智力）是一個具有潛力且發展迅速的領域。
Regular mental exercises are good for maintaining your intelligence. 定期心智練習對保持妳的智力有好處。
She is a highly intelligent student who always gets top marks. 她是一位非常聰明的學生，總是拿到最高分。
Artificial intelligence is becoming more and more advanced nowadays. 人工智慧正變得日益先進。
I didn't intend to hurt your feelings; I'm truly sorry for that. 我不是故意（打算）要傷妳的感情；我真的很抱歉。
The company manages to intend to launch its new products soon. 公司竟然打算近期推出其新產品。
The researchers are conducting an intense study on human health. 研究人員正進行一項關於人類健康的密集（激烈的）研究。
She experienced an intense sense of joy after hearing the news. 聽到消息後，她感受到了一種強烈的（激烈的）喜悅。
An intensely private man, he kept chit-chat to a minimum. 他是一個非常注重隱私的人，所以盡量減少閒聊。
If someone acts intensely, they do so in a way that is to an intense degree, extremely. 如果某人的行為很激烈，那麼他們會以一種非常激烈的方式這樣做。

meaning: 強化或變得更激烈的行為或過程。
sentences: The term intensification refers to The act or process of intensifying, or of making more intense. 強化一詞是指強化或變得更激烈的行為或過程。
We learned the meaning of intensification during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了強化的意義。
The company decided to intensify its marketing efforts to boost sales. 公司決定加強行銷力度以提振銷售額。
The conflict between the two countries began to intensify over the border dispute. 兩國之間的衝突因邊界爭端而開始加劇。
The researchers are measuring the intensity of the light signals. 研究人員正測量光信號的強度。
The intensity of the storm managed to increase significantly tonight. 暴風雨的強度今晚竟然顯著增加了。
The course provides intensive training in English speaking and write. 該課程提供英文口說與寫作的強化（密集的）訓練。
The company is planning to launch an intensive marketing campaign. 公司正計劃發起一場密集的行銷活動。
It was not my intent to offend anyone with my comments at the party. 我並非有意（意圖）在派對上的言論中冒犯任何人。
She was so intent on her work that she didn't hear me enter the room. 她如此專心於工作，以至於沒聽到我進屋。
I have no intention of changing my mind on this important issue. 我無意（意圖）改變我在這個重要問題上的主意。
The manager decided to state his clear intention at the meeting. 經理決定在會議上陳述他的明確意圖。

meaning: 有意或計劃的；有意或自願地進行。
sentences: Something described as intentional is intended or planned; done deliberately or voluntarily. 被描述為故意的事情是有意或計劃的；有意或自願地進行。
The word intentional is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 故意這個詞常用來描述人、事或情況。
To inter means to confine, as in a prison. inter 的意思是限制，就像在監獄裡一樣。
People may inter in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行交流。
The system allows users to interact with each other in real time. 該系統允許使用者彼此即時互動（相互影響）。
Children learn how to interact with others through social play. 孩子們透過社交遊戲學習如何與他人互動。
Social interaction is essential for human health and well-being. 社交互動（交互作用）對於人類健康與福祉至關重要。
The study aims to investigate the interaction between two factors. 該研究旨在調查兩個因素之間的相互作用。

meaning: 提供或涉及與使用者的交互。
sentences: an interactive digital map with zoom and pan features 具有縮放和平移功能的互動式數位地圖
Something described as interactive is offering or involving interaction with the user. 所謂互動的東西是提供或涉及與使用者的互動。
He asked his friend to intercede with his parents on his behalf. 他請朋友代他向父母求情。
The diplomat tried to intercede to resolve the crisis. 外交官試圖代為說項以解決這場危機。

meaning: 停止、偏轉或轉移（正在進行或運動的事物）。
sentences: The police intercepted the package of stolen goods while it was in transit. 警方在運輸途中截獲了這包贓物。
To intercept means to stop, deflect or divert (something in progress or motion). 攔截意味著停止、偏轉或轉移（正在進行或運動的事物）。

meaning: 攔截某物的行為、被攔截的狀態或被攔截的東西。
sentences: The term interception refers to an act of intercepting something, the state of being intercepted, or a thing that is intercepted. 術語「攔截」是指攔截某物的行為、被攔截的狀態或被攔截的事物。
The lesson introduced interception as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了攔截作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
to interchange cares with pleasures 換憂愁
To interchange means to alternate; to intermingle or vary. 交換意味著交替；混合或變化。

meaning: 可自由更換；可隨意交換。
sentences: Eli Whitney's development of interchangeable parts was a breakthrough for modern manufacturing. Prior to that, each part had to be made custom. 伊萊·惠特尼 (Eli Whitney) 開發的可互換零件是現代製造業的一項突破。在此之前，每個部件都必須自訂。
The report describes the result as interchangeable. 該報告將結果描述為可互換的。

meaning: 具有互換或互換的能力。
sentences: The team responded interchangeably to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了交替的反應。
She handled the problem interchangeably during the meeting. 她在會議期間交替處理這個問題。

meaning: 與人打交道，包括商業和貿易。
sentences: The term intercourse refers to dealings with people, including commerce and trade. 交往一詞是指與人交往，包括商業和貿易。
The lesson introduced intercourse as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了性交這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She has a great interest in learning foreign languages. 她對學習外語有很大的興趣。
The history of ancient Egypt has always sparked my interest. 古埃及歷史一直能激發我的興趣。
I am very interested in your new project proposal. 我對你的新專案提案非常感興趣。
Are you interested in joining our hiking club? 你有興趣加入我們的健行社嗎？
I'm reading an interesting book about artificial intelligence. 我正在讀一本關於人工智慧的有趣書籍。
The documentary was very interesting and educational. 這部紀錄片非常有趣且具教育意義。

meaning: 軟體各部分之間的連接；也包括物件或模組的公共或已發布部分。
sentences: This interface is implemented by several Java classes. 此介面由幾個Java 類別實作。
The term interface refers to the connection between parts of software; also the public or published sections of an object or module. 術語「介面」是指軟體各部分之間的連接；也包括物件或模組的公共或已發布部分。
Don't interfere in other people's personal business and affairs. 不要干涉別人的私事。
The loud noise from the street managed to interfere with my work. 街道上的噪音竟然干擾（幹擾）了我的工作。
The government was accused of unnecessary interference in the local economy. 政府被指控對當地經濟進行了不必要的干涉。
Electronic interference can sometimes affect the quality of television signals. 電子干擾有時會影響電視訊號的品質。

meaning: 其他事件之間的過渡或臨時時期。
sentences: His car is in the shop, but they gave him a rental to drive in the interim. 他的車在店裡，但他們暫時租了一輛給他。
The term interim refers to a transitional or temporary period between other events. 術語「過渡」是指其他事件之間的過渡或臨時時期。
The interior design of the apartment is very modern and stylish. 公寓的室內設計非常現代且時尚。
The expedition set out to explore the mysterious interior of the continent. 探險隊出發去探索這片大陸神秘的內地。
He interjected with a funny remark during the meeting. 他在會議期間插了一句滑稽的話。
Please do not interject while I am speaking. 我在講話時請不要插嘴。
Words like 'Oh!' and 'Wow!' are common interjections. 像「噢！」和「哇！」都是常見的感嘆詞。
The discussion was interrupted by several angry interjections from the audience. 討論被觀眾席上幾句憤怒的插話打斷了。
The term interlude refers to An intervening episode, etc. 術語插曲指的是中間插曲等。
We learned the meaning of interlude during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了插曲的意思。

meaning: 處於中間位置的個人或組織（在交易、協議、供應鏈等）。
sentences: The intermediary between the manufacturer and retailer is the wholesaler 製造商和零售商之間的中間人是批發商
The term intermediary refers to a person or organisation in an intermediate position (in a transaction, agreement, supply chain, etc.). 中介一詞是指處於中間位置（在交易、協議、供應鏈等）的個人或組織。
The course is specifically designed for intermediate English learner. 該課程是專門為中級（中間的）英文學習者設計的。
She is currently at an intermediate level in her piano studies now. 她目前的鋼琴學習正處於中級水平。
The term interment refers to The act of burying a dead body; burial. 埋葬一詞是指埋葬屍體的行為；葬禮。
We learned the meaning of interment during today's lesson. 今天的課程我們學習了安葬的意義。

meaning: 休息，尤其是在兩次表演或會議之間，例如音樂會、戲劇、研討會或宗教集會。
sentences: We ordered some drinks for the intermission. 我們在中場休息時點了一些飲料。
The term intermission refers to a break, especially between two performances or sessions, such as at a concert, play, seminar, or religious assembly. 中場休息一詞指的是休息時間，尤其是在兩次表演或會議之間，例如音樂會、戲劇、研討會或宗教集會。

meaning: 間歇性地停止和開始、發生或呈現；在特定時間跨度之後。
sentences: The day was cloudy with intermittent rain. 當天多雲，間斷有雨。
Intermittent bugs are most difficult to reproduce. 間歇性錯誤是最難重現的。
He is working as an intern at a local technology company. 他在當地一家科技公司擔任實習生。
The university offers a variety of internship programs for students. 大學為學生提供多種實習計畫。
The company is undergoing a major internal reorganization. 公司正在進行一項重大的內部改組。
The doctor ordered several tests to check her internal organs. 醫生安排了幾項檢查以檢查她的內臟器官。

meaning: 以內在方式；在外在限制之內或之內；在內心的部分或情況。
sentences: If someone acts internally, they do so in a way that is in an internal manner; within or inside of external limits; in an inner part or situation. 如果某人在內部行事，他們會以一種內在的方式這樣做；在外部限制之內或之內；在內心的部分或情況中。
The speaker responded internally during the discussion. 發言者在討論期間進行了內部回應。
English is an international language used for communication. 英語是用於溝通的國際語言。
The city hosts an international film festival every year. 這座城市每年舉辦一次國際電影節。
The Internet has changed the way we communicate and work. 互聯網改變了我們溝通與工作的方式。
You can find a lot of useful information on the internet. 你可以在網上找到很多有用的資訊。

meaning: 學生為了學習專業或貿易而從事的工作。
sentences: The term internship refers to a job taken by a student in order to learn a profession or trade. 實習一詞是指學生為了學習專業或行業而從事的工作。
The lesson introduced internship as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了實習作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 存在或發生在行星之間。
sentences: Humans are just beginning to explore interplanetary travel. 人類剛開始探索星際旅行。
The report describes the result as interplanetary. 該報告將這一結果描述為行星際的。
The term interplay refers to interaction; reciprocal relationship. 術語“interplay”指的是互動；互惠關係。
The lesson introduced interplay as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了相互作用這個易於理解的有用術語。
Can you help me interpret the meaning of this complex English poem? 你能幫我解釋這首複雜英文詩的含義嗎？
The computer program managing to interpret the data automatically. 電腦程式竟然（能）自動解釋數據。
The two scientists had a different interpretation of the research results. 兩位科學家對研究結果有不同的解釋（詮釋）。
The actor's interpretation of the main character was praised by the critics. 演員對主角的演繹（詮釋）受到了評論界的稱讚。
We need a more interpretative plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更interpretative的計畫。
The instructions were interpretative, so everyone finished quickly. 說明很interpretative，所以大家很快就完成了。
The international summit provided professional interpreters for all the leaders. 國際峰會為所有的領導人提供了專業口譯員。
She works as a sign language interpreter for the hearing impaired. 她擔任聽障人士的手語口譯員。

meaning: 兩個或多個不同種族之間。
sentences: Interracial struggle against Europid people is a para-Marxist notion. 針對歐洲人的種族間鬥爭是準馬克思主義的概念。
Something described as interracial is between or among two or more different races. 所謂跨種族的事物是指兩個或多個不同種族之間的事物。

meaning: 提問或測驗，尤其是以徹底或積極的方式。
sentences: The police interrogated the suspect at some length before they let him go. 警方對嫌疑人進行了一番訊問，然後才將其釋放。
People often interrogate when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時進行審問。
The instructions were interrogative, so everyone finished quickly. 說明很interrogative，所以大家很快就完成了。
We need a more interrogative plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更interrogative的計畫。
"interrogative adverb" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「interrogative adverb」非常好用。
You can use "interrogative adverb" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「interrogative adverb」。
After practice, I could use "interrogative sentence" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「interrogative sentence」。
We used "interrogative sentence" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「interrogative sentence」。
It's considered very rude to interrupt someone while they are speaking. 在別人講話時打斷對方被認為是非常粗魯的。
The heavy rain managed to interrupt the outdoor music festival. 大雨竟然打斷了這場戶外音樂節。

meaning: 中斷的現在分詞和動名詞
